Title: Relates to a nursing facility transition and diversion Medicaid waiting list
Summary: Authorizes the commissioner of health to establish nursing facility transition and diversion Medicaid waiting lists per designated waiver region, once the federally approved capacity for the waiver is reached.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the social services law, in relation to authorizing the commissioner of health to establish nursing facility transition and diversion Medicaid waiting lists per designated waiver region
